properties.name: Bridge Street Substation (Unitil switching hub)
properties.note: Key downtown switching hub; >60 years old; steps transmission down through 4.16 kV distribution. Specific MVA rating not published.

properties.name: McGuire Street Substation + Unitil Concord Region Operations (1 McGuire St)
properties.note: Substation being rebuilt 2025-2026 to absorb load from Bridge St; co-located with Unitil's NH Electric Operations - Capital Region HQ. ~78,900 NH electric customers served statewide.

properties.name: Garvins Falls Hydroelectric Station
properties.note: 12.4 MW total (4 units: 2.4 + 3.2 + 3.4 + 3.4 MW); ~31 GWh/yr. Operated by Central Rivers Power NH LLC. Mid-river on the Merrimack at the Bow/Concord line.

properties.name: Old Turnpike Road Landfill Solar (Kearsarge Power)
properties.note: 6.7 MW DC solar array, ~11,000 panels on 17 leased acres atop the closed/capped city landfill; ~6,000 homes peak. City buys most output. Proposed/permitted 2025.

properties.name: Liberty Utilities / EnergyNorth Concord gas office (116 N Main St)
properties.note: Liberty (EnergyNorth Natural Gas) serves ~98,000 customers across 30 towns along the I-93 corridor; Concord office at 116 N Main St. Distribution utility office, not a production site.

properties.name: Concord Lateral natural gas pipeline (supply tap)
properties.note: Sole bulk gas supply to Concord: Tennessee Gas Pipeline (Kinder Morgan) lateral from Dracut, MA up the I-93 corridor to Concord. Representative point at the southern Bow/Concord gateway. Critical single-feed chokepoint.

properties.name: Rymes Propane & Oil bulk plant (257 Sheep Davis Rd / Rte 9)
properties.note: Regional propane & heating-oil bulk storage and distribution depot (Rymes, acquired by Superior Plus). Bulk fuel reserve east of I-93.

properties.name: 27 Hazen Drive State Data Center (NH Dept of Information Technology)
properties.note: Primary NH Department of Information Technology site / state data center operations. On the I-93 / State Office Park seam.

properties.name: NH State Police HQ Dispatch (33 Hazen Dr) / Concord PSAP
properties.note: NH State Police HQ includes the statewide Dispatch Communications Unit (33 Hazen Dr); NH E911 runs two PSAPs (Concord at 110 Smokey Bear Blvd + Laconia). Representative point at Hazen Dr complex.
